nasb.text: He who descended is Himself also He who ascended far above all the heavens, so that He might fill all things.)

esv.text: He who descended is the one who also ascended far above all the heavens, that he might fill all things.)

ccb.text: 降下的是祂，升到诸天之上的也是祂，祂充满万物。

csbs.text: 降下来的那一位，也就是为要充满万有而升到诸天之上的那一位。
